summary: Iteration 25 bug fix and enhancements fully tested. All features working: 1) Create User dialog Partner role selection NO LONGER CRASHES (value='none' sentinel fix verified). 2) Partner dialog has 'Nutzer suchen...' search field that filters users by name/email. 3) Checked/linked users appear at TOP of the user list. 4) ILS partner has partner@example.com (ILS Admin) linked with checked checkbox. 5) User creation with role=user and role=partner both work correctly.
passed_tests: CREATE USER BUG FIX: Open User anlegen dialog, select role 'Partner' - NO crash, Partner dropdown appears with 'Kein Partner'
CREATE USER BUG FIX: Select role 'User' again after 'Partner' - Partner dropdown hides, no crash
CREATE USER: Fill all fields, select User role, submit - user created with 'User erstellt' toast
CREATE USER: POST /api/admin/users with role=user creates user correctly
CREATE USER: POST /api/admin/users with role=partner and partner_id creates user correctly
CREATE USER: POST /api/admin/users with role=partner (no partner_id) creates user correctly
PARTNER DIALOG SEARCH: Edit ILS partner, see 'Nutzer suchen...' input at top of user list
PARTNER DIALOG SEARCH: Type 'partner' in search field - filters users by name or email
PARTNER DIALOG SEARCH: Clear search - all users shown again
PARTNER DIALOG LINKED: When editing ILS, ILS Admin (partner@example.com) has checked checkbox
PARTNER DIALOG LINKED: Checked users appear at top of list (ILS Admin, TEST Partner Role User at top, Demo User, Test User below)
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/partners returns linked_users array with id, name, email
BACKEND: PUT /api/admin/partners/{id} with linked_user_ids updates user roles correctly
CODE REVIEW: CreateUserDialog uses value='none' as sentinel (not empty string)
CODE REVIEW: PartnerDialog has partner-user-search data-testid
CODE REVIEW: PartnerDialog sorts checked users first (aChecked/bChecked sorting logic)
test_credentials: Admin: admin@example.com / Admin123!, Partner: partner@example.com / Partner123!
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed users for testing (TEST_user_*, TEST_partner_*, TEST_unlink_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 bug fix and enhancements complete: 1) CreateUserDialog in AdminDashboard.js uses value='none' as sentinel for partner_id instead of empty string - this fixes the Radix Select crash when selecting Partner role. On submit, 'none' is converted to undefined. 2) PartnerDialog has userSearch state and 'Nutzer suchen...' input (data-testid='partner-user-search') that filters availableUsers by name or email. 3) User list in PartnerDialog is sorted: checked users first (linked_user_ids), then alphabetically. ILS partner is linked to partner@example.com (ILS Admin). All features verified via backend pytest and Playwright UI tests.
